objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: breakout_donchian_adx
archetype: breakout_donchian_adx
family: breakout
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- donchian(period=15)
- adx(period=10)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close > donchian.upper and adx.adx > 30
- short: close < donchian.lower and adx.adx > 30
exit:
- condition: cross_any(close, donchian.middle) or adx.adx < 20
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.25
tp_atr_mult: 5.5
description: ATR stop-loss (1.25x) and take-profit (5.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: Using a combination of Donchian bands and ADX with ATR based stop-loss and take-profit, combined with Bollinger Bands for price confirmation, can improve breakout trading strategy performance by filtering out range bound market conditions.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This iteration of strategy FICHE_STRATEGIE v1 uses Bollinger Bands, Donchian bands and ADX indicators with an ATR stop-loss and take-profit. The entry is triggered by a combination of cross above the upper band, adx > 30, close below lower band and adx > 30 while exit triggers cross over middle donchian line or if adx drops under 20. This strategy uses no_lookahead and only_registry_indicators constraints to avoid any bias due to data manipulation. The backtest is still running thus results are not yet available.
[Backup plan] 1) If the backtest result shows poor performance, I would try changing the entry criteria by adjusting the period of Donchian bands or adx > 30 condition. Also, fine-tuning stop loss and take profit multipliers could be considered.2) If results are mediocre with low Sharpe ratio, I will increase the timeframe for better market trend identification and adjust ATR multiplier to improve performance.3) If strategy fails to generate satisfactory returns, considering alternative indicators like RSI or MACD might provide a more effective approach.

iterations.hypothesis: Using Bollinger Bands and ATR together with RSI provides better signal quality in trending markets while reducing drawdown during ranging market conditions.
Using a Donchian channel breakout strategy with an ADX trend filter to identify potential breakouts in trending markets.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses Donchian Channels and ADX to identify breakout opportunities in trending markets. It has shown mixed results with high drawdown but negative returns. To improve this, we can try adjusting the parameters of the indicators or use different combinations. We could also consider using other technical indicators for confirmation.
[Backup plan] We will: 
1. Test variations on the Donchian Channels and ADX settings.
2. Introduce additional filters to confirm trend direction (e.g., moving averages, RSI).
3. Use different combinations of indicators based on market conditions.
4. Conduct a thorough backtest with more historical data.
